nasb.text: Now such persons we command and exhort in the Lord Jesus Christ to work in quiet fashion and eat their own bread.

esv.text: Now such persons we command and encourage in the Lord Jesus Christ to do their work quietly and to earn their own living.

cnv.text: 我們靠著主耶穌基督，吩咐勸戒這樣的人，要安靜作工，自食其力。

ccb.text: 我们奉主耶稣基督的名吩咐并劝诫这些人要安分守己，自食其力。

csbs.text: 我们在主耶稣基督里吩咐并劝勉这样的人：要安静做工，吃自己的饭。
